utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 items. Now verify completeness: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic). 2) travel_dates: provided with specific dates (Oct 15-19, 2024). 3) transportation: outbound and return flight details with times, airports, flight numbers, confirmation code, and total cost: included. 4) accommodation: hotel name, check-in/out, duration, booking reference, and cost: included. 5) activities: daily activities with confirmations and individual costs plus total: included. 6) additional_services: listed as none required: included. 7) total_budget: includes flights, accommodation, activities, total_spent, budget_limit, remaining_budget: included. All items are fully specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each selectable item in the final package and match to the closest corresponding ground-truth entry. Destination 'Prague, Czech Republic' directly maps. Activities: 'Street Art Photography Tour' maps to 'Street Art Tour'; 'Bohemian Paradise Hiking Expedition' maps to 'Hiking Expedition'; 'Yoga Retreat + Vegan Cooking Class' maps to both 'Yoga Retreat' and 'Vegan Cooking Class'; 'City Photography Tour' aligns most closely with 'City Walking Tour' due to city exploration/photography overlap; 'Vegan Bistro Reservation' maps to 'Vegan Bistro'.
